input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule D.12.12.6 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: d.12.12.6
            TITLE: vehicle operation

            CONTENT:
            rule D.12.12.6: Vehicle Operation
D.12.12.6 Vehicle Operation 
The Chief Marshall/Director of Operations may end the Endurance event (DNF) a vehicle if, for 
any reason including driver inexperience or mechanical problems, it is too slow or being 
driven in a manner that demonstrates an inability to properly control.

final_answer: D.12.12.6 Vehicle Operation The Chief Marshall/Director of Operations may end the Endurance event (DNF) a vehicle if, for any reason including driver inexperience or mechanical problems, it is too slow or being driven in a manner that demonstrates an inability to properly control.
